heading: Repeal of superseded price support authority and effect of repeal
label: 7960 Repeal of superseded price support authority and effect of repeal
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended sections 1428 and 1441 of this title and repealed 7271 of this title.section 1310 of Pub. L. 107–171section 1310 of Pub. L. 107–171
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended sections 1428 and 1441 of this title and repealed 7271 of this title.section 1310 of Pub. L. 107–171section 1310 of Pub. L. 107–171

children.heading: Disposal
children.label: b Disposal
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law or previous declaration made by the Secretary, the Secretary shall ensure that the disposal of all peanuts for which a loan for the 2001 crop of peanuts was made under before , is carried out in a manner that prevents price disruptions in the domestic and international markets for peanuts.section 7271 of this titleMay 13, 2002

children.heading: Treatment of crop insurance policies for 2002 crop year
children.label: c Treatment of crop insurance policies for 2002 crop year

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: 1 Applicability
children.text: This subsection shall apply for the 2002 crop year only notwithstanding any other provision of law or crop insurance policy.

children.heading: Price election
children.label: 2 Price election
children.text: The nonquota price election for segregation I, II, and III peanuts shall be 17.75 cents per pound and shall be used for all aspects of the policy relating to the calculations of premium, liability, and indemnities.

children.heading: Quality adjustment
children.label: 3 Quality adjustment
children.text: For the purposes of quality adjustment only, the average support price per pound of peanuts shall be a price equal to 17.75 cents per pound. Quality under the crop insurance policy for peanuts shall be adjusted under procedures issued by the Federal Crop Insurance Corporation.
